Pinocchio 5.1
Loading...
Searching...
No Matches
pinocchio.c
Go to the documentation of this file.
1/*****************************************************************
2 * PINOCCHIO V5.1 *
3 * (PINpointing Orbit-Crossing Collapsed HIerarchical Objects) *
4 *****************************************************************
5
6 This code was written by
7 Pierluigi Monaco, Tom Theuns, Giuliano Taffoni, Marius Lepinzan,
8 Chiara Moretti, Luca Tornatore, David Goz, Tiago Castro
9 Copyright (C) 2025
10
11 github: https://github.com/pigimonaco/Pinocchio
12 web page: http://adlibitum.oats.inaf.it/monaco/pinocchio.html
13
14 This program is free software; you can redistribute it and/or modify
15 it under the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by
16 the Free Software Foundation; either version 2 of the License, or
17 (at your option) any later version.
18
19 This program is distributed in the hope that it will be useful,
20 but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of
21 MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE. See the
22 GNU General Public License for more details.
23
24 You should have received a copy of the GNU General Public License
25 along with this program; if not, write to the Free Software
26 Foundation, Inc., 59 Temple Place, Suite 330, Boston, MA 02111-1307 USA
27*/
28
29#include "pinocchio.h"
30#include "def_splines.h"
31
32void abort_code(void);
33void write_cputimes(void);
34
35int main(int argc, char **argv, char **envp)
36{
37
38 /* Initialize MPI */
39 int got_level;
40 MPI_Init_thread(&argc, &argv, MPI_THREAD_FUNNELED, &got_level); // Hybrid MPI and OPENMP parallel
41 MPI_Comm_rank(MPI_COMM_WORLD, &ThisTask); // gives you your rank i.e. ID
42 MPI_Comm_size(MPI_COMM_WORLD, &NTasks); // size of your pool
43
44#ifdef _OPENMP
45 /* initialization of OpemMP */
46#pragma omp parallel
47 {
48#pragma omp master
49 internal.nthreads_omp = omp_get_num_threads();
50 }
51#endif
52
53 /* timing of the code */
54 cputime.total = MPI_Wtime();
55 greetings();
56
57 /* checks that the parameter file is given in the command line */
58 if (argc < 2)
59 {
60 if (!ThisTask)
61 printf("Usage: pinocchio.x parameterfile\n");
62 MPI_Finalize();
63 return 0;
64 }
65
66 /* exit now if a snapshot is required and SNAPSHOT is not set */
67#ifndef SNAPSHOT
68 if (argc >= 3 && atoi(argv[2]) > 1)
69 {
70 if (!ThisTask)
71 printf("Sorry but you have to use the SNAPSHOT directive in compilation to write a snapshot\n");
72 MPI_Finalize();
73 return 0;
74 }
75#endif
76
77 /* exit now if a snapshot is required and SNAPSHOT is not set */
78#ifndef TABULATED_CT
79 if (argc >= 3 && atoi(argv[2]) == 1)
80 {
81 if (!ThisTask)
82 printf("Sorry but you have to use the TABULATED_CT directive in compilation to write the collapse time table\n");
83 MPI_Finalize();
84 return 0;
85 }
86#endif
87
88 /* initialization */
89 memset(&params, 0, sizeof(param_data));
90 strcpy(params.ParameterFile, argv[1]);
91 if (initialization())
92 abort_code();
93
94 /*****************************************/
95 /*********** Special behaviour ***********/
96 /*****************************************/
97 /* called as "pinocchio.x parameterfile 1" it computes and writes collapse time table, then exit */
98 if (argc >= 3 && atoi(argv[2]) == 1)
99 {
100#ifdef TABULATED_CT
101 if (!ThisTask)
102 {
103 printf("In this configuration pinocchio will only compute a table of collapse times\n");
104 }
105
106 /* CYCLE ON SMOOTHING RADII */
107 for (int ismooth = 0; ismooth < Smoothing.Nsmooth; ismooth++)
108 {
109 double cputmp = MPI_Wtime();
110
111 if (!ThisTask)
112 printf("\n[%s] Starting smoothing radius %d of %d (R=%9.5f, sigma=%9.5f)\n",
113 fdate(), ismooth + 1, Smoothing.Nsmooth, Smoothing.Radius[ismooth],
114 sqrt(Smoothing.Variance[ismooth]));
115
116 if (initialize_collapse_times(ismooth, 1))
117 return 1;
118
119 if (!ThisTask)
120 printf("[%s] Collapse times computed, cpu time =%f s\n", fdate(), cputmp);
121 }
122
123 if (!ThisTask)
124 printf("Pinocchio done!\n");
125
126 MPI_Finalize();
127
128#endif
129 return 0;
130 }
131
132 /* On request, it writes the density field */
133 if (argc >= 3 && atoi(argv[2]) == 2)
134 {
135#ifdef SNAPSHOT
136 /* called as "pinocchio.x parameterfile 2" it writes the density field
137 in configuration space and exits */
138 if (!ThisTask)
139 printf("In this configuration pinocchio only writes the linear density field in a snapshot\n");
140
141 for (int ThisGrid = 0; ThisGrid < Ngrids; ThisGrid++)
142 {
143 write_in_cvector(ThisGrid, kdensity[ThisGrid]);
144 double time = reverse_transform(ThisGrid);
145 if (!ThisTask)
146 printf("[%s] compute_derivative: done fft, cpu time = %f\n", fdate(), time);
147 write_from_rvector(ThisGrid, density[ThisGrid]);
148 if (write_density(ThisGrid))
149 abort_code();
150 }
151#else
152 if (!ThisTask)
153 printf("Please compile the code with SNAPSHOT directive to use this option\n");
154
155#endif
156 if (!ThisTask)
157 {
158 write_cputimes();
159 printf("Pinocchio done!\n");
160 }
161
162 MPI_Finalize();
163 return 0;
164 }
165
166 /* called as "pinocchio.x parameterfile 3" it computes displacements and writes a standard snapshot,
167 then exit */
168 if (argc >= 3 && atoi(argv[2]) == 3)
169 {
170#ifdef SNAPSHOT
171
172 if (!ThisTask)
173 {
174 printf("In this configuration pinocchio will only produce a GADGET snapshot\n");
175 printf("at the first redshift specified by the %s file (z=%f)\n", params.OutputList, outputs.z[0]);
176 }
177
178 /* compute displacements for all particles */
179 double cputmp = MPI_Wtime();
180 if (!ThisTask)
181 printf("\n[%s] Computing displacements\n", fdate());
182
183 if (compute_displacements(1, 1, outputs.z[0]))
184 abort_code();
185
186 cputmp = MPI_Wtime() - cputmp;
187 if (!ThisTask)
188 printf("[%s] Done computing displacements, cpu time = %f s\n", fdate(), cputmp);
189
190 /* write the snapshot */
191 cputmp = MPI_Wtime();
192 if (!ThisTask)
193 printf("\n[%s] Writing the snapshot\n", fdate());
194
195 if (write_LPT_snapshot())
196 abort_code();
197
198 cputmp = MPI_Wtime() - cputmp;
199 if (!ThisTask)
200 printf("[%s] Done snapshot, cpu time = %f s\n", fdate(), cputmp);
201#endif
202
203 if (!ThisTask)
204 printf("Pinocchio done!\n");
205
206 MPI_Finalize();
207
208 return 0;
209 }
210
211 /******************************************/
212 /*********** Standard behaviour ***********/
213 /******************************************/
214
215 if (params.ReadProductsFromDumps)
216 {
217 /* on request, read products from dump files and skip the first part */
218 if (read_dumps())
219 abort_code();
220 }
221 else
222 {
223 /* computation of collapse times and displacements */
224 if (compute_fmax())
225 abort_code();
226
227 /* on request, dump products to files for skipping fmax */
228 if (params.DumpProducts)
229 if (dump_products())
230 abort_code();
231 }
232
233 /* fragmentation of the collapsed medium */
234 if (fragment_driver())
235 abort_code();
236
237 fflush(stdout);
238 MPI_Barrier(MPI_COMM_WORLD);
239
240 /* output detailed cpu times */
241 cputime.total = MPI_Wtime() - cputime.total;
242 if (!ThisTask)
243 write_cputimes();
244
245 /* done */
246 if (!ThisTask)
247 printf("Pinocchio done!\n");
248#ifdef MASS_MAPS
249 mass_maps_free_sheets();
250#endif
251 MPI_Finalize();
252
253 return 0;
254}
255
256void abort_code(void)
257{
258 printf("Task %d aborting...\n", ThisTask);
259 MPI_Abort(MPI_COMM_WORLD, 1);
260}
261
262void write_cputimes()
263{
264 printf("Total: %14.6f\n", cputime.total);
265 printf("Initialization: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.init, 100. * cputime.init / cputime.total);
266 printf(" Density in PS: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.dens, 100. * cputime.dens / cputime.total);
267 printf("fmax: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.fmax, 100. * cputime.fmax / cputime.total);
268#ifdef TWO_LPT
269 printf(" LPT: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.lpt, 100. * cputime.lpt / cputime.total);
270#endif
271 printf(" Derivatives: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.deriv, 100. * cputime.deriv / cputime.total);
272 printf(" Mem transfer: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.mem_transf, 100. * cputime.mem_transf / cputime.total);
273 printf(" FFTs: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.fft, 100. * cputime.fft / cputime.total);
274 printf(" Collapse times: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.coll, 100. * cputime.coll / cputime.total);
275 printf(" inv.collapse: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.invcoll, 100. * cputime.invcoll / cputime.total);
276 printf(" ellipsoid: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.ell, 100. * cputime.ell / cputime.total);
277 printf(" Velocities: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.vel, 100. * cputime.vel / cputime.total);
278 printf("Fragmentation: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.frag, 100. * cputime.frag / cputime.total);
279 printf(" Redistribution: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.distr, 100. * cputime.distr / cputime.total);
280 printf(" Sorting: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.sort, 100. * cputime.sort / cputime.total);
281#ifdef PLC
282 printf(" Groups total: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.group, 100. * cputime.group / cputime.total);
283 printf(" Groups PLC: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.plc, 100. * cputime.plc / cputime.total);
284#else
285 printf(" Groups: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.group, 100. * cputime.group / cputime.total);
286#endif
287 printf("Total I/O: %14.6f (%5.2f%%)\n", cputime.io, 100. * cputime.io / cputime.total);
288}
